description: 新闻时讯 - 红黑强对比 + 快节奏,信息密度高,适合资讯 / 热点 / 速读类短文

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: left; margin: 32px 0 18px; padding: 0 0 14px 0; border-bottom: 3px solid #d4231c; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0;
styles.h2: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; margin: 36px 0 16px; padding: 8px 14px; background: #1a1a1a; border-left: 6px solid #d4231c; line-height: 1.45; letter-spacing: 0.3px; display: inline-block;
styles.h3: font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 800; color: #d4231c; margin: 26px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 0 12px; border-left: 4px solid #d4231c; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 14px 20px; background: #1a1a1a; border-left: 4px solid #d4231c; color: #f5f5f5; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 0; margin: 24px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
styles.code_inline: background: #f2f2f2; color: #d4231c; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
styles.code_block: background: #1a1a1a; color: #f5f5f5; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border-left: 4px solid #d4231c; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #d4231c; font-weight: 900; font-size: 16px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #ffffff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; min-width: 22px; height: 22px; background: #d4231c; text-align: center; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 13.5px; border: 2px solid #1a1a1a; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #1a1a1a; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 800; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-bottom: 2px solid #d4231c; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #6a6a6a; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #d4231c; letter-spacing: 8px; font-size: 13px; margin: 34px 0; user-select: none; font-weight: 800;

list_style.label: A · 红块反白
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: #d4231c; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; min-width: 24px; height: 22px; line-height: 22px; text-align: center; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #d4231c; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px;
